selected: to capture prey and slowly consume it

system.moves:
- Leap on prey and knock it prone
- Inject a paralytic venom
- Drag helpless prey into the canopy and cocoon it

So far, these hound-sized spiders have thankfully avoided hunters and trappers in the Wood. They certainly haven’t come near town. But they’re out there, rest assured, and growing in numbers. Something interesting: Nailadd venom paralyzes prey, rather than killing it. Something useful: You can harvest the venom (d4 uses, dangerous, reload, Value 1) from an intact corpse. When you coat a blade in nailadd venom, it deals +1d4 extra
